text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I pass by an arcade<n>downtown to find...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day! I'm gonna win that<n>ice cream
cushion!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I really shouldn't be here, then...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh, why's that? It's always more<n>fun when
you're around, Rice! I<n>wanna do it together!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... I'll just bring you misfortune<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Remember our lunch today? Our food<n>got stolen
by a stray cat.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah. That was so funny! We gotto eat and play with the cat at thesame time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll handle the claw! You stand<n>next to me
and tell me what to do!<n>Aaand go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? You want me to... Uh, um,<n>er, I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I thought I had it just now! Next<n>time I'll get
it for suresies!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-Urara! You only have enough<n>money for one
more try!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You were trying so hard too... If only<n>there was
something I could do!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! A blackout! Everything's gone<n>dark!
Ahaha, I can't see anything!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Not right on your last try! It must<n>be because
I'm here...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! The lights are back on!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh wow! Look, Rice! The claw's<n>super fast now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It may be due to the sudden power<n>outage, but
the claw machine's arm is<n>moving around with
incredible speed.

text_block_list.name: Arcade Employee
text_block_list.text:
My apologies! It seems to be<n>malfunctioning. I'll
fix it at once!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that employee's gonna give us<n>the
cushion! I think he said it was an<n>apology
because there are bugs in the<n>machine? How
nice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who caused you trouble,<n>though. I'm
so sorry.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Now you're apologizingtoo? Why? Didn't you have funtoday?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I know I had a blast! Like, therewas a blackout, and then the clawwas zooming everywhere. It was sofun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Everything is always so much better<n>when
you're here! Let's hang out<n>again soon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-Urara... Okay... Thank you very<n>much!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I love hanging out with you too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Great! Then let's hang out all the<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just watching Haru Urara and Rice<n>Shower
interact warms my heart.
